headline: Nervous investors await Micron earnings as chip sector whipsaws
summary: The spotlight is on chipmaker Micron Technology as it prepares to report earnings, with investors bracing for further volatility following sharp market swings fueled by large flows tied to SpaceX and a two-day boom-bust in semiconductor stocks.  Last ‌June, Micron was a well-known if somewhat obscure company with a market value of $136 billion and a long history, but not ‌necessarily one whose quarterly earnings reports caught investors' fancy.  Fast forward a year, and Micron is one of the stars of the technology rally that has sent chipmakers around the world ​soaring, igniting a fresh trading frenzy even after a dozen or more months of AI excitement.

content.title: Nervous investors await Micron earnings as chip sector whipsaws
content.summary: The spotlight is on chipmaker Micron Technology as it prepares to report earnings, with investors bracing for further volatility following sharp market swings fueled by large flows tied to SpaceX and a two-day boom-bust in semiconductor stocks.  Last ‌June, Micron was a well-known if somewhat obscure company with a market value of $136 billion and a long history, but not ‌necessarily one whose quarterly earnings reports caught investors' fancy.  Fast forward a year, and Micron is one of the stars of the technology rally that has sent chipmakers around the world ​soaring, igniting a fresh trading frenzy even after a dozen or more months of AI excitement.

headline: Micron Q3 earnings: How much higher can this chip stock run?
summary: AI chipmaker Micron Technology (MU) is due to report its fiscal third quarter earnings results after Wednesday's market close. The company's stock has gained by 270% year-to-date in 2026. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman, Yahoo Finance Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley, and Opening Bell Media CEO Phil Rosen discuss how much higher Micron's stock could run following this earnings report.

content.title: Micron Q3 earnings: How much higher can this chip stock run?
content.description:
AI chipmaker Micron Technology (MU) is due to report its fiscal third quarter earnings results after Wednesday's market close. The company's stock has gained by 270% year-to-date in 2026.

Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman, Yahoo Finance Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley, and Opening Bell Media CEO Phil Rosen discuss how much higher Micron's stock could run following this earnings report.

headline: Micron to report Q3 earnings after market close: What to expect
summary: As tech and software stocks take a hit on Tuesday, memory chipmaker Micron Technology (MU) has dropped by as much as 12% in the session. Shares are still maintaining gains of over 270% in 2026 ahead of the company's latest earnings this Wednesday, June 24. Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré and Mariner Wealth Advisors chief investment strategist Jeff Krumpelman take a closer look at what Wall Street is expecting from Micron's fiscal third quarter earnings results.

Last June, Micron was a well-known if somewhat obscure company with a market value of $136 billion and a long history, ‌but not necessarily one whose quarterly earnings reports caught investors' fancy.  Fast forward a year, and Micron is one of the stars of the technology rally that has sent chipmakers ​around the world soaring, igniting a fresh trading frenzy even after a dozen or more months of AI excitement.

content.title: Anxious investors await Micron earnings as chip sector whipsaws
content.summary: The spotlight is on chipmaker Micron Technology as it prepares to report earnings, and investors are bracing for more volatility after recent market swings fueled by large flows tied to SpaceX and a two-day boom-bust ‌in semiconductor stocks.  Last June, Micron was a well-known if somewhat obscure company with a market value of $136 billion and a long history, ‌but not necessarily one whose quarterly earnings reports caught investors' fancy.  Fast forward a year, and Micron is one of the stars of the technology rally that has sent chipmakers ​around the world soaring, igniting a fresh trading frenzy even after a dozen or more months of AI excitement.

headline: Latest News In AI Chips - Menlo Ventures Secures $3 Billion For AI Investment Expansion
summary: In a significant move for the AI chip industry, Menlo Ventures has announced securing $3 billion in new capital dedicated to investing in promising AI companies at various stages of development. This investment is poised to support advancements across the AI stack, from foundational infrastructure to AI-native applications in sectors such as enterprise, healthcare, and consumer markets. headline: US stocks edge higher as falling oil prices help take pressure off the market
summary: Stocks edged higher on Wall Street Wednesday as falling bond yields and lower oil prices helped ease pressure on the market.  Technology stocks were mixed after two days of losses that heavily weighed on the broader market.  Micron Technology, which reports its latest financial results later Wednesday, fell 0.4% following its 13.2% plunge on Tuesday.
